title: Ultraevoker(Discontinued)
description: The Ultra Evoker is a powerful enhanced evoker boss
body:
Ultra Evoker Mod
1. Overview

The Ultra Evoker is a powerful enhanced evoker boss designed to provide a challenging and dynamic combat experience. With three distinct phases and a diverse arsenal of spells, this boss will test your skills and strategy.
2. Base Attributes

    Health: 600 HP

    Armor: 15 points

    Follow Range: 40 blocks

    Movement Speed: Slow (0.25)

    Melee Damage: 5 points

    Experience Reward: 100 points upon defeat

3. Three-Phase Combat System
3.1 Phase One: Basic Form (100%-51% HP)

    Combat State: Maintains initial form

    Attack Spells:

        Fang Strike

        Icicle

        Magic Missile

        Devour

        Blood Needles

    Defense Spells:

        Fang Ward

        Blight

    Movement Spells:

        Burning Dash

    Support Spells:

        Blight

        Root

3.2 Phase Two: Enraged Form (50%-26% HP)

    Activation: Triggers at 50% HP

    Form Change: Enters enraged state with enhanced aggression

    Audio Cue: Celebration sound effect

    Additional Attack Spells:

        Firecracker

        Fireball

        Magic Arrow

        Thunderstorm

    Additional Defense Spells:

        Shield

        Invisibility

    Additional Movement Spells:

        Frost Step

    Support Spells:

        Maintains Phase One abilities

3.3 Phase Three: Final Form (25%-0% HP)

    Activation: Triggers at 25% HP

    Form Change: Enters ultimate combat mode

    Audio Cue: Low-pitched celebration sound effect

    Ultimate Attack Spells:

        Ray of Frost

        Lightning Lance

        Stomp

        Shockwave

        Eldritch Blast

        Maintains Phase Two attack spells

    Ultimate Defense Spells:

        Counterspell

    Ultimate Movement Spells:

        Blood Step

        Evasion

        Maintains Phase Two movement spells

    Ultimate Support Spells:

        Echoing Strikes

        Maintains previous phase support abilities
